ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Power Banks) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller who listed the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period of the product */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Current discount percentage on the product */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the product is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the seller */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the seller */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business (e.g., individual, company) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the seller registered on the platform */,
  "payment_methods_accepted" TEXT /* Payment methods accepted by the seller */,
  "return_policy" TEXT /* Return policy of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "battery_capacity" TEXT /* Battery capacity of the product */,
  "input_ports" TEXT /* Input ports available on the product */,
  "output_ports" TEXT /* Output ports available on the product */,
  "charging_speed" TEXT /* Charging speed of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "features" TEXT /* Additional features of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "warranty_info" TEXT /* Detailed warranty information */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_specs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level of the product (threshold for triggering reordering) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
column_names: Category of the product (e.g., Power Banks)
ID of the seller who listed the product
